text.title: PM + Tech-Lead Grooming Agenda Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Grooming becomes 45min status update; no decisions made.
antipattern.fix: Cap agenda at 3 blocks; chair enforces.

antipattern.symptom: Debt quota ignored for 6 sprints; team velocity drops 40%.
antipattern.root-cause: Tech-debt block dropped under feature pressure.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires debt block; chair refuses agenda without it.

antipattern.symptom: 5 of 7 items 'parked'; same list 3 weeks later.
